title: PHQ-2 Depression Screener
description: A brief 2-question screening tool that helps identify whether a more detailed depression assessment may be helpful.
instructions: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?

questions.text: Little interest or pleasure in doing things

bands.label: Low Likelihood
bands.description: Your responses suggest a low likelihood of depression. Continue with the course to build your understanding and coping skills.

bands.label: Elevated Score
bands.description: Your responses suggest further exploration may be helpful. The full PHQ-9 assessment later in this course will give you a more detailed picture.

disclaimer: This is a brief educational screening tool, not a clinical diagnosis. If you are in crisis or need immediate help, please call or text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline).
